en-US.title: Luche
en-US.subtitle: Track motor symptoms
en-US.description:
Record guided movement tests with your iPhone and follow experimental movement estimates over time.

Luche helps you capture consistent movement videos for research and wellness. You can review previous recordings, see trends, and share recordings and results with people you trust. Videos are recorded without audio.

Every Luche result is an experimental estimate, not a diagnosis. Luche is not a medical device and should not be used to make medical decisions. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional about your health.
